title: Letter from the Chair of the Office for Value for Money (OVfM) to the Comptroller & Auditor General
body: "As part of the OVfM’s continued engagement with the National Audit Office, these letters set out the OVfM’s input into Spending Review 2025, how it has delivered against the mandate set by the Chancellor of the Exchequer at Budget 2024, its planned next steps, and the NAO’s reflections. "
